x-enumeration-literals.name: Instant Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are earned immediately at the time of transaction or activity.

Comment:
Example: Points credited instantly after a card purchase.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Delayed Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are earned at the time of activity but credited after a delay.

Comment:
Example: Cashback credited 30 days after purchase settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are accumulated over a period and applied in batches.

Comment:
Example: Monthly points credited based on total spending in that month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are earned only when a specific event or milestone is achieved.

Comment:
Example: Bonus points awarded after completing 10 transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are credited at the end of a billing or statement cycle.

Comment:
Example: Credit card points posted at the end of the month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Anniversary Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are credited on specific dates or anniversaries.

Comment:
Example: Bonus points on account anniversary or customer birthday.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Timing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are credited only after certain conditions are verified or approved.

Comment:
Example: Referral points credited after the referred customer activates their account.
